exchanges.prompt: Design a multi-cloud architecture using AWS S3 for storage, Azure Functions for compute, and GCP BigQuery for analytics with a Kubernetes orchestration layer

response.content:
sequenceDiagram
  participant K8s as Kubernetes
  participant S3 as AWS S3
  participant AF as Azure Functions
  participant BQ as GCP BigQuery
  participant App as Application
  Note over K8s,S3,AF,BQ: Multi-Cloud Architecture
  App->>K8s: Deploy Application
  K8s->>S3: Store Data
  K8s->>AF: Trigger Compute
  AF->>S3: Read Data
  AF->>BQ: Send Data for Analytics
  BQ-->>AF: Analyzed Data
  AF-->>K8s: Processed Data
  K8s-->>App: Response
  activate K8s
  K8s->>AF: Manage Compute
  K8s->>S3: Manage Storage
  K8s->>BQ: Manage Analytics
  deactivate K8s
  Note over K8s,S3,AF,BQ: Scalable and Secure Architecture
